name: Astec Industries, Inc.
description: Astec Industries, Inc. designs, engineers, manufactures, and markets equipment and components used primarily in road building, utility, and resources sectors. The company operates through two main segments: Infrastructure Solutions and Materials Solutions. Its product offerings include asphalt and concrete mixing plants, asphalt pavers, screeds, milling machines, stabilizers, material transfer vehicles, and a wide range of crushing, screening, washing, and conveying equipment. Astec serves customers globally, supporting infrastructure development and materials processing industries.
